title: WALPURGISNACHT
subtitle: Ward C, Parish Hospital · 3:30 AM · the last shift
epigraph_upright: The threshold honored. The page turned cleanly. The doorway named so the soul going through it knows where it is. Death upright is the chaplain at 3 AM lighting the small candle in each room — not for the dead, who don't need it, but for the room, which does.
epigraph_reversed: The vigil that goes on too long. The ward that won't close because nobody who worked here will say the sentence out loud. Death reversed is the keeper who has become the room.
scene_description: 3:30 AM in Ward C of Graustark Parish Hospital. The asylum wing. Faded green tile, fluorescent dim. The last five patients were transferred to Lake Charles on Wednesday. The building goes vacant at sunrise. Sister Beatrice — the chaplain who has served this ward for thirty years — has come down for the last vigil. The night nurse, Pearl, is at the station with the chart binder closed for the first time in three decades. The cupola has had a missing pane since the '92 storm; the wind sounds different through it tonight.
direction_hint: Walk the rounds. Light the small candle in each of the five rooms. Record the last vigil in the night log. Don't fall asleep at the nurses' station. Don't, when the cupola starts to make its sound, listen to it for more than the count of three.
opening_log_lines: 3:30 AM. The corridor is the corridor. The fluorescent above ward 3 has the buzz.
Pearl looks up from the desk as you come down the hall. She nods.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk the corridor.

inertia_thresholds.label: the cupola has weather coming through it
the gurney moves a half-inch in no draft
the chart binder opens by itself
the vigil did not, this time, hold

thresholds.label: SOUTH DOOR
thresholds.flavor: Out into the main hospital corridor. Past the chapel. Toward the staff entrance and the dawn that's coming.

notes: Death scenario. Win = light a candle in all five wards (ROUND or HOLD HAND at each ward), log the vigil (CHECK CHART at the station), connect 2 visitors (Pearl always; one of Dr Savoy or the family). Loss: vigil pin at 12 (chaplain has become the room), or dawn arrives without the vigil being logged.
